caption:
🌙 When the library clock strikes 2 AM, the rest of the campus sleeps, but I wake up. My silk blouse hugs every curve I wanted to show off tonight, the low V-neckline teasing a hint of cleavage that disappears under the fabric when I lean. I'm grading papers for my favorite student, a guy who never misses class and stares way too long. The room is quiet, save for the soft hum of the overhead lights and the rustle of turning pages. I shift in my chair, the pencil skirt hugging my hips and the blazer I left open slipping slightly to reveal the lace bralette underneath. He leans in to ask about a question, his breath warm against my neck, and I catch myself biting my lip. The air feels thick, charged with more than just academic curiosity. I fix my skirt, smooth my hair, and whisper, 'Close the book,' feeling his gaze travel right over my skin. It's not just a lesson anymore; it's an electric pulse that keeps me awake, wondering if tonight is just another late night or the start of something more dangerous. 💋

#TeacherLife #UniversityVibes #LateNightStudy #SecretDesires #CurvesAndBooks #AcademicRomance #StunningTeacher #InstaSexy #CampusSecrets
